    {"n": 11, "column": "left", "text": "Wisch aisDarra tahs

rr."},
    {"n": 12, "column": "left", "text": "Bet ta Gudriba/ kur ta
taps atrasta/ un kur irr tahs
Sapraſchanas Weeta?"},
    {"n": 13, "column": "left", "text": "Tas Zilweks ne finna zik

rosta eekſch tas Semmes to
Oshwo."},
    {"n": 14, "column": "left", "text": "Tas Besdibbins fakka:
Ta eekſch mannim ne irr/ un ta
Juhra tafka: Ta pee mannim
ne irr."},
    {"n": 15, "column": "left", "text": "Seltn par winnu ne warr
dohſ/ nedſ Gudraba Diaktu par

    {"n": 16, "column": "left", "text": "Un to ne warr spreest par

keem."},
    {"n": 17, "column": "left", "text": "Ne weens warr winnat

nus lihdsi turreht/ nedſ winnu
prett Selta Elihtumeem ismiht."},
    {"n": 18, "column": "left", "text": "Pehrtes un dahrgas Sih-
les wiſſai ne warr peeniinneht/
un ta Gudriba irr augstaka ne
la Rubbina Akmint."},
    {"n": 19, "column": "left", "text": "Tas Topaz no Mohru-
Semmes winnai ne teek lihdsi
turrehts/ un tas wiffutchihſtajs
Selts winnai ne panahk."},
    {"n": 20, "column": "right", "text": "Nu tad/no kurrenes nahe
ta Gudriba? un kur irr tahs
Sapraſchanas Weeta?"},
    {"n": 21, "column": "right", "text": "Jo ta irr apſlehpta
preekſch Wisfu Azzim/ kas dsh-
wo/ un teem Putneem appakſch
Debbes irr ta noſlehpta."},
    {"n": 22, "column": "right", "text": "Ta Pasufchanas Weeta
unt ta Nahwe fakka: Mehs eſtam
winnasSlavu ar muhfahn Au-
sim dsirdejscht."},
    {"n": 23, "column": "right", "text": "Deewg taproht winnas
Zettu/ un tas pasihſt winnas
Weetu."},
    {"n": 24, "column": "right", "text": "Jo winſch fkattahs lihds
tahs Semmes Galleem/ winſch
redsappakſch wiffahn Debbefim."},
    {"n": 25, "column": "right", "text": "Kad winſch Wehjam fa-
wu Swarru darrija/ unto/ uh-
deni uſtwehre ar Mehru."},
    {"n": 26, "column": "right", "text": "Kad winſch Keetum Mehr-
ki nolikfe/ un Sibbizam un
Pehrkornam weenu Zettu."},
    {"n": 27, "column": "right", "text": "Tad redſeja winſch to un

    {"n": 28, "column": "right", "text": "Un faztija us to Zilweku:

na/ ta irr Gudriba/ un no Lau-
na atſtahtees/ ta irr Sapra-
ſhana."},
    {"n": 1, "column": "right", "text": "Ta XXIX. Nodalla.

mus Wahrdus/ un faz-
